# AnyTune

> Free guitar/bass tuner PWA with editable per-string tunings.
> Live: https://badkirill.github.io/anytune/

## Agent entry (mandatory for code work)

- [Agent guide](AGENTS.md): workflow, stack, hard rules
- [Agent protocol](docs/knowledge/AGENT_PROTOCOL.md): selective reading + knowledge maintenance
- [Knowledge index](docs/knowledge/INDEX.md): tag → area routing (read this first)
- [Knowledge catalog](docs/knowledge/CATALOG.md): human overview
- [Knowledge graph](docs/knowledge/graph.json): machine nodes/edges

## Area guides

- [Architecture](docs/knowledge/areas/architecture.md)
- [Audio](docs/knowledge/areas/audio.md)
- [Core music](docs/knowledge/areas/core-music.md)
- [Core signal](docs/knowledge/areas/core-signal.md)
- [Core tunings](docs/knowledge/areas/core-tunings.md)
- [Components](docs/knowledge/areas/components.md)
- [State](docs/knowledge/areas/state.md)
- [Storage](docs/knowledge/areas/storage.md)
- [Testing](docs/knowledge/areas/testing.md)
- [CI/CD](docs/knowledge/areas/ci-cd.md)
- [Patterns](docs/knowledge/areas/patterns-and-rules.md)
- [Tooling](docs/knowledge/areas/tooling.md)
- [File index](docs/knowledge/areas/file-index.md)

- [Claude entry](CLAUDE.md)
